title.zh: 测测你的恋爱心理温度

description.zh: 是心动啊～还是心不动？来，8道小问题，看看你在爱情里是热情小太阳，还是佛系养老选手。
description.en: Heart racing or heart resting? 8 questions to reveal your love style – from sunshine lover to Zen master.

coverImageStyle.zh: 粉紫色渐变背景，中央有一个半透明的心形轮廓，心形内是一支温度计，温度计从冷蓝渐变到暖红。
coverImageStyle.en: Purple-pink gradient background with a semi-transparent heart outline containing a thermometer from cool blue to warm red.

text.zh: 周末下午，你收到一条“在干嘛？”的消息，第一反应是？
text.en: On a weekend afternoon, you get a text saying 'What are you up to?' Your first reaction?

text.zh: 又要找我帮忙？先晾一会儿
text.en: They probably need a favor – leave on read

text.zh: 有点开心但故意慢点回
text.en: A little happy but wait a bit to reply
Reply immediately – maybe even a voice note

description.zh: 你像一只在窗台上晒太阳的猫...（完整中文文案）
description.en: You're like a cat sunbathing on a windowsill...（完整英文文案）
